Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera when precision aiming.

cameraType.Wiki: The behavior to use for this camera.

cameraBasePosType.Wiki: The reference point to use for this camera.

lookAtOffsetX.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the x-axis (in metres).

lookAtOffsetY.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the y-axis (in metres).

lookAtOffsetZ.Wiki: The look-at focus offset on the z-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

positionOffsetZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

panSpeedLimitMin.Wiki: The minimum speed limit for panning (in radians per second).

panSpeedLimitMax.Wiki: The maximum speed limit for panning (in radians per second).

panSpeedAccelMin.Wiki: The minimum acceleration for panning (in radians per second).

panSpeedAccelMax.Wiki: The maximum acceleration for panning (in radians per second).

panSpeedBrakeMin.Wiki: The minimum brake speed for panning (in radians per second).

panSpeedBrakeMax.Wiki: The maximum brake speed for panning (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedLimitMin.Wiki: The minimum speed limit for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedLimitMax.Wiki: The maximum speed limit for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedAccelMin.Wiki: The minimum acceleration for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedAccelMax.Wiki: The maximum acceleration for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedBrakeMin.Wiki: The minimum brake speed for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltSpeedBrakeMax.Wiki: The maximum brake speed for tilting (in radians per second).

tiltUpLimit.Wiki: The upwards tilt angle limit (in degrees).

tiltDownLimit.Wiki: The downwards tilt angle limit (in degrees).

startTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

endTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

startTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

endTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

lensSimuParamId.Wiki: The lens simulation parameters to use for this camera.
